segments.text: I saw your name light up again
And I almost answered like always
But I can't keep being the place you go
Rain on glass, guitar comes in slow
Just because you missed the burn
I won't say the sharp words Just to make the silence hurt
I know you want the thunder When the quiet gets too loud
But I won't be your reason I keep breaking down
No, no, I won't be your fighter
No, no, no I still care,
You call me when the room gets cold When the
posters on your wall start looking like ghosts
You say you need a reason just to feel something real
But every time I answer I become what you can't heal
I know the kind of love that turns into a war
I know you think the hurt means somebody's state
But pain is not proof that love is real
And the world was ever safe
I used to throw the mats Then cry about the smoke
I used to say the things that cut into your throat
But tonight I'm holding back With both hands on the wire
If I love you at all I can be your fire
Just because you missed the burn
I won't say the sharp words Just to make the silence hurt
I know you want the thunder When the quiet gets too loud
I keep your name in my phone like a bruise
I don't want peace, I don't know what that means
I only feel close when you're angry at me
Say something cold, make it sound like you care
I can't stand the dark when there's nobody there
Just to prove I'm still here
What am I supposed to do when the night comes by?
Then I'll leave one night on
But I won't feed the fire
I'm saying no because I love you enough
can miss you and still not answer
I can love you and still not answer
I can love you and leave the room
I can pray that you'll find daylight
I can hold all the good parts
I can remember your soft voice
I can cry for the old days
Another night, we're the worst thing
Just because you missed the burn
I won't say the sharp words
Just to make the silence hurt
I know you want the thunder
When the quiet gets too loud
I won't be the dark thing
That helps you hate your life
I'll leave a little light on
I hope you get through tonight
I hope you don't need pain
But I'll leave you the light
